prompt_text: Recommended AI tooling tools for AI engineers building knowledge-intensive LLM and RAG applications companies
response:
# AI Tooling for Knowledge-Intensive LLM/RAG Applications

## **Core RAG & Retrieval Infrastructure**

### Vector Databases
- **Pinecone** – Managed, easiest to start (serverless scaling)
- **Weaviate** – Open-source, flexible schema, GraphQL API
- **Milvus** – Open-source, high performance, good for enterprise
- **Qdrant** – Modern, excellent filtering, strong developer experience
- **Elasticsearch** – Hybrid search (dense + sparse), production-proven
- **Chroma** – Lightweight, good for prototyping

### Knowledge Graph & Structured Data
- **Neo4j** – Graph queries, relationship reasoning
- **Amazon Neptune** – Managed graph DB
- **TigerGraph** – High-performance graph analytics

---

## **LLM Platforms & APIs**

- **OpenAI API** (GPT-4, embeddings) – Industry standard
- **Anthropic Claude** – Strong reasoning, 200K context window
- **Cohere** – Retrieval-focused, embedding reranking
- **Together AI / Replicate** – Open-source model serving
- **Mistral / LLaMA via Fireworks AI** – Cost-effective alternatives
- **Azure OpenAI** – Enterprise compliance

---

## **RAG Frameworks & Orchestration**

- **LangChain** – Most mature, extensive integrations
- **LlamaIndex** – Purpose-built for RAG, strong indexing
- **Haystack** – Production RAG pipelines
- **LangGraph** – Advanced agentic workflows (newer)
- **CrewAI** – Multi-agent orchestration
- **AutoGen** – Conversation-based agent frameworks

---

## **Data Ingestion & Processing**

### Document Processing
- **Unstructured.io** – Document parsing (PDFs, images, tables)
- **Docling** (IBM) – Structured document understanding
- **PyPDF / pdfplumber** – PDF extraction
- **Tesseract / Paddle OCR** – Document OCR

### ETL & Data Pipeline
- **Airbyte** – ELT for RAG sources (Salesforce, databases, APIs)
- **Prefect / Dagster** – Workflow orchestration
- **Fivetran** – Enterprise data connectors

---

## **Evaluation & Quality**

- **Ragas** – RAG evaluation (context relevance, answer relevance, faithfulness)
- **Langsmith** – LLM observability & testing (by LangChain)
- **ArizeAI** – ML monitoring for LLM outputs
- **Confident AI / DeepEval** – LLM evaluation frameworks
- **Weights & Biases** – Experiment tracking

---

## **Observability & Production**

- **Langsmith** – Debugging, monitoring, testing
- **Helicone** – LLM API observability
- **Humanloop** – Model evaluation & feedback loops
- **Portkey** – LLM API gateway, fallbacks, caching
- **OpenTelemetry** – Standardized observability

---

## **Embeddings & Semantic Search**

- **Sentence Transformers** – Open-source, fast local embeddings
- **OpenAI Embeddings** – Proprietary, high quality
- **Cohere Embeddings** – Optimized for retrieval
- **E5 / BGE Models** – Recent SOTA open alternatives
- **ColBERT** – Late interaction for dense retrieval

---

## **Advanced RAG Techniques**

- **LlamaIndex Query Engines** – Advanced routing, synthesis
- **HyDE** (Hypothetical Document Embeddings) – Query expansion
- **ColBERT / Dense Passage Retrieval** – Better ranking
- **Hybrid Search** (BM25 + semantic) – Built into most vector DBs
- **Graph RAG** – Microsoft's structured knowledge integration

---

## **Agentic & Multi-Step Reasoning**

- **LangGraph** – State machine workflows for complex RAG
- **Anthropic Prompt Caching** – Context reuse for cost savings
- **Tree of Thoughts / Chain-of-Thought** – Improved reasoning
- **Self-Correcting agents** – Iter
